title: Škoda Varsovia - MTR/NTE RP
description: This resource pack is an add-on for the Minecraft Transit Railway mod with NTE mod. It adds the Skoda Varsovia train from the Warsaw Metro on the game. (⚠ Not affiliated with any real brand displayed in the pack)
body:
# Škoda Varsovia
## NTE Required

The Škoda Varsovia is an electric multiple unit train type developed by Škoda Transportation and operated by the Warsaw Metro as their sixth and latest generation of rolling stock.

The resourcepack includes:
- Škoda Varsovia train

You're allowed to modify it, use it in modpack or in servers.
